interpretation: No KIC 8462852 analogue in 103433 ZTF stars across 44 off-plane fields; 95% Poisson upper limit on the deep-dimming/secular-fade fraction = 2.90e-05. At this sample size ~1 analogue would be expected at the Kepler ~1e-5 base rate; the non-detection constrains the occurrence rate to within a factor of a few of that rate.
